title: scutellaria humilis
intro: Scutellaria humilis, also known as Little Blue Skullcap, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to Eastern Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Scutellaria humilis include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating insomnia, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria humilis typically include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
